data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,700 USDT with a Narrowed 2.32% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 18, 2025, 12:33 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,700 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,700.590088 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 2.32% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Abstract Users Face Targeted Attack, Not A Global Wallet Issue
data.description: According to Odaily, developer 0xBeans reported that some Abstract users have been targeted by an attack. However, this issue does not appear to be a network-wide problem with the Abstract Global Wallet (AGW). The issue seems to be isolated to a specific application, possibly Cardex, and users are advised to avoid interactions with it for the time being. Efforts are underway to determine the cause of the problem. It is reiterated that this is not a global AGW issue but rather a problem with a particular application. Further updates will be provided as the investigation continues.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 96,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.17% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 18, 2025, 12:35 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 96,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 96,075.46875 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.17% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Bank of America survey: Nearly 90% of investors believe that US stocks are overvalued
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News In Bank of America's February global fund manager survey, 89% of investors surveyed believed that U.S. stocks were overvalued. The survey found that this was the highest level since at least April 2001. Over the past 10 years, an average of 81% of fund manager investors surveyed have always believed that U.S. stocks are overvalued. (Jinshi)

data.title: Tether Plans Major Acquisition In South America
data.description: According to Foresight News, Tether is planning to acquire a 51% stake in the South American energy company Adecoagro. The deal is valued at approximately $1.24 billion.

data.title: Majority Of Fund Managers Anticipate Fed Rate Cuts In 2025
data.description: According to Odaily, a global fund manager survey conducted by Bank of America in February reveals that most respondents expect the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates this year. Approximately 77% of the surveyed fund managers anticipate a rate cut by the Fed in 2025. Among them, 46% foresee two rate cuts, 27% predict one, and 4% expect three cuts. Meanwhile, 19% of respondents believe interest rates will remain unchanged, and only 1% anticipate a rate hike by the Federal Reserve in 2025.

data.title: Chinese Ethereum holder spends $6.8M to warn against mass mind control
data.description:
A Chinese programmer sent about $6.8 million in ETH to burn addresses and donations, claiming corporations were using mind-control technology to enslave people.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/chinese-man-burns-eth-mind-control-claims?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Xu Zhengyu: Continuously review and improve the regulatory system to cultivate a more complete Hong Kong virtual asset ecosystem
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News - Hong Kong Financial Services and the Treasury Bureau Director Paul Hui said that the regulatory system in Hong Kong is being constantly reviewed and improved to foster a more complete virtual asset ecosystem, including the development of a comprehensive framework that includes virtual asset exchanges, stablecoin issuers, custodians and over-the-counter trading activities.
Paul Hui said that Hong Kong is building a bridge between traditional finance and the rapidly developing digital economy, and the regulatory framework has established a solid foundation for this trend of change. For example, the Securities and Futures Commission has announced regulatory expectations for intermediaries engaged in tokenized securities-related activities, providing clarity for market participants and creating a credible innovation environment. He emphasized that the trend of tokenization and the transformation of artificial intelligence can only realize their full potential in a reliable and adaptable regulatory system, and will protect the market with fairness, consistency and the highest standards. (Yahoo Finance)
